note: add explicit V13 upgrade window 11,900 -> 11,999 to public surface. (A) website/sost-explorer.html — V13 RC1 operator banner now shows a new red chip 'UPGRADE WINDOW: BLOCKS 11,900 - 11,999' next to the existing 'UPDATE + NTP BEFORE 12,000' amber chip; a new red 'UPGRADE WINDOW #11,900 - #11,999' stat tile sits between 'ACTIVATION HEIGHT #12,000' and 'V14 FALLBACK #15,000'; a new dedicated red-bordered panel appears immediately above 'WHAT V13 CHANGES AT BLOCK 12,000' explaining the recommended 5-step sequence inside the window (stop miner -> verify SHA256SUMS + gpg signature against release key 41B1A46E626064AB524CB99EB6B9E2852AE41A04 -> swap binary -> activate NTP via timedatectl set-ntp true -> restart miner with --wallet + --mining-key-label) and the consequence of waiting until block 12,000 (pre-V13 binary on stale rule set, pre-NTP host produces rejected blocks). (B) docs/V13_MINER_OPERATOR_CHECKLIST.md — added new section 0 'Upgrade window — blocks 11,900 -> 11,999' before section A 'Binary' with the same 5-step sequence and the 'NOT waiting until block 12,000' warning. (C) docs/V13_PUBLIC_SCOPE_UPDATE.md — section 7 'Miner operator checklist (short form)' restructured to lead with the upgrade window, followed by the 5-step sequence and the 'watch block 12,000 land' post-swap check. (D) website/api/explorer_version.json bumped v270 -> v271. Pure HTML/text/JSON edit. ZERO src/, ZERO schemas, ZERO scripts, ZERO tests, ZERO consensus, ZERO wallet/payment/broadcast/release-upload changes. Block height 11,900 is the START of the recommended upgrade window (~18 h before activation, room for one full sleep cycle); block 11,999 is the LAST safe block. The DTD lottery indexer 'incomplete · N wins un-credited by DTD scan · open DTD section to refresh' wording in the address page was NOT changed in this commit (the UTXO-derived balance and DTD payout count are unaffected by the indexer's catch-up state; a separate UX-only commit may rewording it to remove the misleading 'incomplete' framing).
